verdict.answer_first: B gets closer: after 'we can skip the menu' it gives 'here's what I'll produce' with plan areas; A leads with questions and says 'Once I can see the code...'.
verdict.decisiveness: B still surveys options, but A pushes the choice back harder with 'What auth do you want'; neither commits to one recommendation.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it lists concrete workstreams: 'Data model', 'Flows', 'Sessions', 'Routes/UI', 'Security baseline', 'Rollout'.
